nasb.text: Those who were rebuilding the wall and those who carried burdens took their load with one hand doing the work and the other holding a weapon.

esv.text: who were building on the wall. Those who carried burdens were loaded in such a way that each labored on the work with one hand and held his weapon with the other.

cnv.text: 那些建造城牆，搬運重物的，都是一隻手作工，一隻手緊握兵器。

ccb.text: 搬运工人一手工作，一手拿兵器。
